planning_basis.observed_pr: Completed TASK-0001, TASK-0003, TASK-0004, and TASK-0005 cycles measured from the canonical 72-event snapshot.
planning_basis.strategy: Rolling-wave planning: only detailed tasks are executable; reserves are non-executable.
planning_basis.production_loc_definition: Count nonblank, non-comment executable-source lines in shipped, installed, or runtime/installation source: non-test .go and shipped .py, .sh, or .c. Excludes tests, planning/review documents, task/operator docs, workflows, declarative systemd/PAM/sudoers configuration, generated, and vendor.

tasks.title: core lease state, readiness, and absolute expiry
TOTP replay, rate limits, and concurrency
Codex CLI, socket access, and redaction
Per-sudo live lease check and no cache
tasks.estimate_basis: TASK-0004 post-preflight cycle: ceil((3779000 / 60000) * 1.20) = 76; upper bound unknown

tasks.title: Restricted non-force push and token custody
tasks.estimate_basis: unknown until the preflighted bare-repository and credential-injection design is approved; no fixed SLOC throughput

tasks.title: Measurement and rolling-wave replanning gate
tasks.estimate_basis: zero-production measurement gate; duration is evidence-dependent

future_milestones.title: audit and attested release reserve
future_milestones.description: Reserve only: future minimal audit, declarative bundle, and source-free attested release work.
future_milestones.eligible_for: ineligible for PLAN/DEV/branch/PR until TASK-0009 passes REVIEW and QA and is merged.

future_milestones.title: clean canary reserve
future_milestones.description: Reserve only: future clean artifact canary and rollback evidence.
future_milestones.eligible_for: ineligible for PLAN/DEV/branch/PR until TASK-0009 passes REVIEW and QA and is merged.

rules.preflight: excluded from cycle and stage timing; a preflight failure means not_started
rules.contingency: apply ceil(observed non-preflight time * 1.20); null remains null and SLOC receives no multiplier
rules.evidence: derive next-wave sizing from observed completed cycles
rules.sparse_evidence: do not assume fixed SLOC throughput when evidence is sparse
rules.conversion: convert only the next 2-3 future milestones into detailed contracts
rules.remeasurement: insert the next measurement gate after those 2-3 tasks
rules.corrections: preserve raw records with source_event_id and superseded_by; derive effective classifications only from unsuperseded records
rules.missing_values: retain non-derivable numeric values as null with a reason; zero requires explicit evidence

delivery_guardrails.production_sloc_counting: Count nonblank, non-comment executable-source lines only, within the production-LOC file definition.
delivery_guardrails.no_compression: LOC caps never authorize semicolon or one-line packing, collapsed error handling, cryptic names, removal of security comments, or combining functions solely to reduce LOC. REVIEW rejects these patterns. gofmt and normal idiomatic structure are mandatory.
delivery_guardrails.projected_cap_trigger: At projected use above 90% of a task cumulative ceiling, re-estimate before DEV.
delivery_guardrails.candidate_cap_trigger: If a candidate exceeds its ceiling, shed only in the listed order, rerun PLAN and QA before DEV continues, and never compress implementation.
delivery_guardrails.mandatory_v1: Never shed readiness; TOTP replay, rate, or absolute lease controls; SO_PEERCRED fail-closed IPC; per-sudo pam_exec live check/no cache; secret non-disclosure from argv/log; source-free attested artifact; or external-trace-compatible minimal audit. If these mandatory v1 requirements still exceed 1500 production SLOC, stop as a requirement gap.
ordered_feature_shedding: automated canary executable; retain manual runbook/evidence
rich status/JSON UX; retain activate and immediate revoke
rich audit schema/correlation; retain minimal external-trace correlation ID, actor, scope, result, expiry
precomputed pack-size/history diagnostics; retain exact repo/ref/clean tree and normal non-force rejection
explicit remote-OID prefetch/race diagnostics; rely on standard non-force git rejection and generic failure
automated installer/rollback executable; retain declarative units and manual verified install/rollback
GitHub push capability moves to v2, leaving TOTP full-sudo authority as v1

acceptance_checks: Only tasks are eligible for PLAN/DEV/branch/PR.
Only TASK-0007, TASK-0008, and TASK-0009 are newly executable; retained future milestones remain ineligible until TASK-0009 passes and merges.
TASK-0006 records every listed cycle metric, excludes preflight, applies 20% contingency, and does not assume fixed SLOC throughput when sparse.
REVIEW verifies non-compressed idiomatic production source and gofmt.
Candidate over-cap follows exact shedding and re-approved PLAN/QA; mandatory v1 over 1500 is a requirement gap.

human_gate_evidence.review_checklist: Record inspection of the task acceptance evidence, production-SLOC count against its ceiling, and no-compression/guardrail compliance.
human_gate_evidence.qa_checklist: Independently repeat the focused validation and SLOC count, compare the result with the task acceptance and dependency boundary, and record PASS or FAIL evidence.
